sectiondef.header: Device registers

briefdescription.para: Command and Status Register Space 0x040-0xFC Registers.
Local Configuration Space 0 Base Address CSR.
Local Configuration Space 1 Base Address CSR.
Host Base Device ID Lock CSR.

detaileddescription.para: Extended features LP Serial Register Block Header

briefdescription.para: Port n Link Maintenance Request CSR.
Port n Local Ack ID CSR.
Port n Error and Status CSR.

sectiondef.header: Device Identity CAR bit definitions.

description.para: These bits are associated with the XSRIO_DEV_ID_CAR_OFFSET register.

sectiondef.header: Device Information CAR bit definitions.

description.para: These bits are associated with the XSRIO_DEV_INFO_CAR_OFFSET register.

sectiondef.header: Assembly Identity CAR bit definitions.

description.para: These bits are associated with the XSRIO_ASM_ID_CAR_OFFSET register.

sectiondef.header: Assembly Device Information CAR bit definitions.

description.para: These bits are associated with the XSRIO_ASM_INFO_CAR_OFFSET register.

sectiondef.header: Processing Element Features CAR bit definitions.

description.para: These bits are associated with the XSRIO_PEF_CAR_OFFSET register.

briefdescription.para: Common Transport Large System support Mask.

sectiondef.header: Source Operations CAR bit definitions.

description.para: These bits are associated with the XSRIO_SRC_OPS_CAR_OFFSET register and XSRIO_DST_OPS_CAR register.

sectiondef.header: PE Logical layer Control CSR bit definitions.

description.para: These bits are associated with the XSRIO_PELL_CTRL_CSR_OFFSET register.

sectiondef.header: Local Configuration Space Base Address 1 CSR bit definitions.

description.para: These bits are associated with the XSRIO_LCS1_BASEADDR_CSR_OFFSET register.

sectiondef.header: Base Device ID CSR bit definitions.

description.para: These bits are associated with the XSRIO_BASE_DID_CSR_OFFSET register.

briefdescription.para: Large Base Device ID Mask(16-bit device ID)
Base Device ID Mask(8-bit device ID)

sectiondef.header: Host Base Device ID CSR bit definitions.

description.para: These bits are associated with the XSRIO_HOST_DID_LOCK_CSR_OFFSET register.

sectiondef.header: LP - Serial Register Block header bit definitions.

description.para: These bits are associated with the XSRIO_EFB_HEADER_OFFSET register.

sectiondef.header: Port Link timeout value CSR bit definitions.

description.para: These bits are associated with the XSRIO_PORT_LINK_TOUT_CSR_OFFSET register.

sectiondef.header: Port response timeout value CSR bit definitions.

description.para: These bits are associated with the XSRIO_PORT_RESP_TOUT_CSR_OFFSET register.

sectiondef.header: Port General Control CSR bit definitions.

description.para: These bits are associated with the XSRIO_PORT_GEN_CTL_CSR_OFFSET register.

sectiondef.header: Port n maintenance request CSR bit definitions.

description.para: These bits are associated with the XSRIO_PORT_N_MNT_REQ_CSR_OFFSET register.

sectiondef.header: Port n maintenance response CSR bit definitions.

description.para: These bits are associated with the XSRIO_PORT_N_MNT_RES_CSR_OFFSET register.

sectiondef.header: Port n local ack ID CSR bit definitions.

description.para: These bits are associated with the XSRIO_PORT_N_ACKID_CSR_OFFSET register.

briefdescription.para: Out bound ACK ID Reset Mask.
In bound ACK ID Reset Mask.

sectiondef.header: Port n Error and Status CSR bit definitions.

description.para: These bits are associated with the XSRIO_PORT_N_ERR_STS_CSR_OFFSET register.

sectiondef.header: Port n Control CSR bit definitions.

description.para: These bits are associated with the XSRIO_PORT_N_CTL_CSR_OFFSET register.

sectiondef.header: LP -Serial Lane Register Block Header bit definitions.

description.para: These bits are associated with the XSRIO_SL_HEADER_OFFSET register.

sectiondef.header: LP -Seral Lane n Status 0 CSRS bit definitions.

description.para: These bits are associated with the XSRIO_SLS0_CSR(x) register.

sectiondef.header: LP -Seral Lane n Status 1 CSRS bit definitions.

description.para: These bits are associated with the XSRIO_SLS1_CSR(x) register.

briefdescription.para: Connected port transmit Emphasis Tap(+1) Status Mask.
Connected port transmit Emphasis Tap(-1) Status Mask.
Connected port lane Receiver trained Mask.

sectiondef.header: Water Mark CSRS bit definitions.

description.para: These bits are associated with the XSRIO_IMP_WCSR_OFFSET register.

sectiondef.header: Buffer Control CSRS bit definitions.

description.para: These bits are associated with the XSRIO_IMP_BCSR_OFFSET register.

sectiondef.header: Maintenance Request Information Register bit definitions.

description.para: These bits are associated with the XSRIO_IMP_MRIR_OFFSET register.

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the SRIO

simplesect.para: C-style signature: u32 XSrio_ReadReg(u32 BaseAddress, u32 RegOffset)

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the SRIO.

simplesect.para: C-style signature: void XSRIO_WriteReg(u32 BaseAddress, u32 RegOffset, u32 Data)
